channel.title: Materials Testing
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Materials Testing

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Victor Olexander Dzenzerskiy, Serhii Vasyl Tarasov, Olena Victor Sukhova, Volodymyr Anatoliy Ivanov DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: Microstructure and mechanical properties of friction welded dissimilar AISI 1040 and AISI 304 steels
item.description: Article by Victor Olexander Dzenzerskiy, Serhii Vasyl Tarasov, Olena Victor Sukhova, Volodymyr Anatoliy Ivanov DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0156

item.title: Comparing and optimizing different bio-inspired crash box designs

item.title: Comparative study of state-of-the-art metaheuristics for solving constrained mechanical design optimization problems: experimental analyses and performance evaluations

item.title: Effects of casting mold temperature on tensile properties of Pb–Sn–Ca alloys for negative grids of lead-acid batteries
item.description: Article by Victor Olexander Dzenzerskiy, Serhii Vasyl Tarasov, Olena Victor Sukhova, Volodymyr Anatoliy Ivanov DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mt-2024-0205
